data.html:
<html><head>
  <meta charset="utf-8"> <!-- Important: rapi-doc uses utf8 characters -->
  <script type="module" src="https://unpkg.com/rapidoc/dist/rapidoc-min.js"></script>
</head>
<body style="height: 100vh; margin: 0px;">
<rapi-doc id="rapiDoc" spec-url="chemical.json" show-header="false" heading-text="CCTE Public APIs" header-color="#FF791A" fill-request-fields-with-example="true" update-route="false" show-info="true" allow-authentication="true" allow-server-selection="false" allow-spec-url-load="false" allow-spec-file-load="false" allow-spec-file-download="false" allow-search="false" allow-advanced-search="false" allow-api-list-style-selection="false" theme="light" bg-color="#fff" text-color="#444" primary-color="#162e51" load-fonts="true" font-size="largest" show-method-in-nav-bar="as-colored-block" use-path-in-nav-bar="false" nav-bg-color="#f0f0f0" nav-text-color="#444" nav-accent-text-color="#FF5733" nav-accent-color="#FF791A" nav-active-item-marker="colored-block" nav-item-spacing="relaxed" layout="row" render-style="focused" schema-style="table" show-components="false" allow-try="true" show-curl-before-try="true"> </rapi-doc>

</body></html>
